assessor_raw: Transformer vs BoW for support ticket classification: design is sound. Pre-trained initialization is appropriate for the hypothesis. Macro-F1 aligned with stakeholder objectives. Routing queue features correctly excluded. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Transformer vs BoW for support ticket classification: design is sound. Pre-trained initialization is appropriate for the hypothesis. Macro-F1 aligned with stakeholder objectives. Routing queue features correctly excluded. Verdict: defense_wins.
